title: App Settings - General - Licenses
scenario: Verify that "Third-party Software" headline and its licenses with Source and License links are visible under App Settings > General > Licenses and also appear in Phone Settings > Poly Lens > Acknowledgements.
steps: 1. Navigate to App Settings > General > Licenses.
2. Verify that the "Third-party Software" headline is visible.
3. Confirm that a list of licenses is displayed below the headline.
4. For each license in the list, verify that a Source link is present.
5. For each license in the list, verify that a License link is present.
6. Navigate to Phone Settings > Poly Lens > Acknowledgements.
7. Verify that the same licenses appear in this section.
expected: The "Third-party Software" headline is visible under App Settings > General > Licenses, with a list of licenses each containing both a Source link and a License link. The same licenses also appear under Phone Settings > Poly Lens > Acknowledgements.
